text: I am surrounded by the quiet weight of possibility—glass walls and empty chairs silent witnesses to ideas waiting to take form. Stepping into the vibrant, expressive R+D space, I feel the buzz of creativity and intellectual playfulness. The juxtaposition of sterile, modern architecture with the lively, engaging wall makes me feel as if I am walking between order and inspiration. I am both unsettled and intrigued, wondering what innovations might quietly emerge in this place.
